title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for event contracts by challenging regulators and eventually suing the CFTC. The startup spent four years gaining regulatory approval before reaching a $22 billion valuation and scaling 100x in four weeks.
